name: TenantQuotaMaterializer

ironRules.rule: ALL quota keys MUST be written atomically using Redis MULTI/EXEC in a single transaction. Individual SET loops are prohibited — a crash between iterations leaves partial quota state.
Quota values MUST derive from tier definitions in FREEDOM config (tenant_quota_tier_{tier}). Hardcoded quota constants are prohibited — all limits must be operator-tunable via FREEDOM.
Quota key filter MUST exclude non-quota keys before MULTI/EXEC. Writing to unrelated Redis keys during materialization causes cross-concern pollution.
TenantQuotaMaterialized MUST include keyCount — the number of quota keys written. Downstream monitors use keyCount to detect incomplete materializations.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — NEVER from request payload.

keywords: tenant quota materializer Redis MULTI EXEC atomic no individual SET loop tier definitions FREEDOM config quota key filter TenantQuotaMaterialized keyCount
